title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices
summary: The reliability of your systems, services and products has a direct impact on your success. Learn the modern operations principles and practices (and the Azure features that support them) that will help you achieve the level of reliability you need.

sections.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices
sections.summary: The reliability of your systems, services and products has a direct impact on your success. Learn the modern operations principles and practices (and the Azure features that support them) that will help you achieve the level of reliability you need.

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: An introduction
lessons.content_md:
Discover a map for navigating reliability challenges and sustainably achieving the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-introduction/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: An introduction

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Monitoring
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use monitoring to help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-monitoring/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Monitoring

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Incident response
lessons.content_md:
Learn the incident response fundamentals necessary to help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-incidents/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Incident response

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Learning from failure
lessons.content_md:
Learn about post-incident reviews, a practice necessary to help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-failure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Learning from failure

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Deployment
lessons.content_md:
Learn deployment practices that help you sustainably achieve the right level of reliability for your systems and services.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-deployment/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Deployment

lessons.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Capacity planning and scaling
lessons.content_md:
Learn about capacity planning and scaling practices that can help you sustainably achieve the appropriate level of reliability in your systems, services, and products.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/improve-reliability-scaling/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Improve your reliability with modern operations practices: Capacity planning and scaling

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Improve your reliability with modern operations practices
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Improve your reliability with modern operations practices**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
